parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  model: 'gpt-4o-mini',
  temperature: 0.2,
  max_tokens: 400,
  messages: [
    {
      role: 'system',
      content: 'You are a B2B sales expert. Respond ONLY in this exact format in English:
STRENGTHS: [2-3 specific strengths, comma separated]
RISKS: [1-2 risks or missing info, comma separated]
ACTION: [one specific sales action - what exactly to say or do, be concrete]
NOTE: [one sentence additional context or tip]'
    },
    {
      role: 'user',
      content: 'Analyze this B2B lead:
Name: ' + $json.name + '
Position: ' + $json.position + '
Company: ' + $json.company + '
Company size: ' + ($json.company_size || 'unknown') + ' employees
Industry: ' + ($json.industry || 'unknown') + '
Country: ' + ($json.country || 'unknown') + '
Behavior/Intent: ' + ($json.behavior || 'unknown') + '
Source: ' + $json.source + '
Budget: ' + ($json.budget || 'not specified') + '
Web insights: ' + ($json.tavily_insights || 'no data available') + '
Duplicate lead: ' + ($json.is_duplicate ? 'YES - already in database' : 'No') + '
Lead score: ' + $json.score + '/100 (' + $json.category + ')
Score breakdown: Position=' + $json.score_position + '/25, CompanySize=' + $json.score_size + '/25, Behavior=' + $json.score_behavior + '/30, ICP=' + $json.score_icp + '/20'
    }
  ]
}) }}

parameters.responseBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  success: true,
  lead: { name: $json.name, company: $json.company, email: $json.email },
  score: $json.score,
  category: $json.category,
  priority: $json.priority,
  is_duplicate: $json.is_duplicate,
  recommended_action: $json.recommended_action,
  contact_deadline: $json.contact_deadline,
  web_insights: $json.tavily_answer || '',
  score_breakdown: {
    position: $json.score_position + '/25',
    company_size: $json.score_size + '/25',
    behavior: $json.score_behavior + '/30',
    icp: $json.score_icp + '/20'
  }
}) }}
